summary: VIP Hub StyleSheet split fix VERIFIED WORKING on mobile viewport (390x844). All 8 tabs render correctly with proper styles. The fix splits the oversized StyleSheet.create() object (813 lines) into _coreStyles (436 lines) and _extStyles (378 lines), merged via spread operator at line 3762. This resolves the mobile Safari rendering bug.
critical_code_review_comments: StyleSheet split implemented correctly at hub.tsx lines 2946-3381 (_coreStyles), 3383-3760 (_extStyles), merged at line 3762
briefingStyles remains as separate StyleSheet at lines 3764-3798 (35 lines - within safe limit)
Total combined styles work correctly with spread operator: const styles = { ..._coreStyles, ..._extStyles }
context_for_next_testing_agent: VIP Hub mobile rendering bug FIXED. StyleSheet split working. All tabs verified on mobile viewport 390x844.

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: VIP Hub content in Portfolio and Social tabs fails to render with proper styles on mobile browsers due to oversized StyleSheet.create() object (813 lines)
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Split into _coreStyles (436 lines) + _extStyles (378 lines), merged via spread operator
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: FIXED - All tabs now render with proper styles on mobile viewport 390x844

mocked_apis_note: NO MOCKED APIs - The /api/news endpoint supplements live results with mock data (as noted in request)
